name: Foamy Cranberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and confectioners' sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg yolk to the mixture and stir well.
3. Incorporate the sweetened cranberry juice and grated orange rind.
4. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg white just before serving.
5. This recipe yields 1 1/2 cups and pairs beautifully with Cranberry Pudding.
